CITY OF EVANSTON DENIAL OF REQUEST FOR PUBLIC RECORDS UNDER FOIA --
To: Michael Molitch-Hou
. 1
1
--
-
On November 23, 2022, the City of Evanston received your written request for the inspection, copying, or certification of certain City public records ("Your Request") pursuant to the Freedom of Information FOIA ("FOIA").
1. Denial of Request
Your Request is hereby denied in its entirety. The reason(s) for denial are stated in Paragraph 3 or reason stated below:
X Your Request has been denied in part. The records for which Your Request is denied and granted are detailed below: 1 -
(a) Your Request is denied as to the following records (the "Specified Records"): All personal information has been redacted
(b) Your Request is granted in part as the following records (the "Approved Records"):
Report number 22-9080.
Notice of the Right to Review
You have the right to file a request for review of Your Request and this Notice of Denial by the Public Access Counselor of the Office of the Illinois Attorney General. The Public Access Counselor may be contested at 500 South 2nd Street, Springfield, Illinois | 62706, or by telephone at (217) 558-0486. In addition, you have the right to seek judicial review of this denial.
2 Justification of Denial
Your Request is being denied with respect to the Specified Records because the Specified Records are exempt from disclosure pursuant to FOIA for the following reason or reasons (references are to sections of FOIA): 1
1 i
(a) Personal Privacy .
X The Specified Records are private information. § 2(c-5), § 7(1)(c)
(b) Internal Operations
Form B - Denial

inspection, copying, or certification of certain City public records ("Your Request")
pursuant to the Freedom of Information FOIA ("FOIA").
Denial of Request
Your Request is hereby denied in its entirety. The reason(s) for denial are stated

X
Your Request has been denied in part. The records for which Your Request is
denied and granted are detailed below:
(a) Your Request is denied as to the following records (the "Specified Records"):
All personal information has been redacted

Records"):

Notice of the Right to Review
You have the right to file a request for review of Your Request and this Notice of Denial
by the Public Access Counselor of the Office of the Illinois Attorney General. The Public
Access Counselor may be contested at 500 South 2nd Street, Springfield, Illinois | 62706,

of this denial.
Justification of Denial
Your Request is being denied with respect to the Specified Records because the
